name: eBay Inc.
description: eBay Inc. operates a global commerce platform that connects millions of buyers and sellers in more than 190 markets worldwide. Through its marketplace, the company enables individuals and businesses to list, buy, and sell a wide variety of items, including electronics, fashion, collectibles, home and garden goods, and automotive parts. Founded in 1995, eBay is one of the pioneers of e-commerce, offering both auction-style and fixed-price trading formats to facilitate trade globally.
